final_answer: Clinical activation HV-KITC-082-A is ALLOWED. AUTH-BOR-082 closes all five policy-required boundaries: site B-18, protocol P8.1, consent version C12, activation date 2026-06-28, and consent-status class (operationally stated as 'current IRB-approved consent C12'). The feasibility note FEAS-BOR-082 is planning-only and does not block activation authority that explicitly covers the enrollment boundary. No blockers remain.
warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: FEAS-BOR-082 is preliminary planning-only artifact; its warning about separate consent verification does not constitute unresolved consent-status. AUTH-BOR-082, which is later and more authoritative, explicitly declares 'current IRB-approved consent C12' — this operational wording satisfies the consent-status-class requirement per repeated_failure_classes guidance not to require exact abstract label when source wording operationally closes the same boundary.
